actor-start.eventDescription: Base fee for initializing the research agent and preparing the environment.

task-completed-quick.eventDescription: Light research: 5 search results + 3 pages analyzed. Best for fast overviews and fact-checking.

task-completed-standard.eventDescription: Balanced research: 10 search results + 7 pages analyzed. Best for market snapshots and competitor briefs.

task-completed-deep.eventDescription: Comprehensive research: 20 search results + 15 pages analyzed. Best for due diligence and investment memos.
